entry.title: OpenAI Codex Now Reads and Writes Across Multiple Project Folders at Once
entry.summary: Codex local projects can now span multiple folders, letting the agent read and write across them while keeping one Git root in charge.

entry.title: OpenAI Ships GPT-Live Voice to Desktop, Turning Speech Into Agent Control
entry.summary: ChatGPT Voice lands on macOS and Windows desktops, letting you control your computer and direct multiple AI agents using only your voice.

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Opus Finally Powers Voice Mode With Real Tool Access
entry.summary: Claude's voice mode now runs on Opus and Sonnet, can call your connected tools mid-conversation, and speaks 18+ languages on every plan

entry.title: AMD and Cerebras Pair Helios With Wafer-Scale Engine for 5x Faster Inference
entry.summary: AMD and Cerebras pair Helios rack-scale GPUs with the Wafer-Scale Engine to deliver the fastest production inference on trillion-parameter models at 5x greater efficiency

entry.title: Runway Builds the First AI Router Spanning Video, Image, and Audio
entry.summary: Runway's new Media Router lets developers set quality, cost, or latency preferences once and automatically routes each request to the best video, image, or audio model.

entry.title: OpenAI Rolls Out ChatGPT Health to 300 Million Weekly Users
entry.summary: ChatGPT Health graduates from beta to full U.S. rollout, letting users connect Apple Health and medical records directly into their AI conversations â powered by the new GPT-5.6 Sol model

entry.title: Black Forest Labs' FLUX 3 Beats Runway Gen-4.5 and Now Runs Factory Robots
entry.summary: Black Forest Labs launches FLUX 3, a single model that generates video, audio, images, and drives real robots on Audi's production floor

entry.title: Prime Intellect Unifies 365,000 Agentic Tasks Into one Open RL Training Framework
entry.summary: Prime Intellect unifies 365,000+ validated agentic RL tasks across SWE, terminal, and search behind a single API and image registry

entry.title: Google's SymptomAI Beats Human Clinicians at Diagnosing 13,917 Real Patients
entry.summary: Google's SymptomAI outperformed independent clinicians on differential diagnosis in a 13,917-person national study, using Gemini Flash 2.0 to conduct real-world symptom interviews end-to-end.

entry.title: Browser Use Ships game-mode, an AI Agent That Builds and Playtests Web Games
entry.summary: Browser Use's new /game-mode lets an AI agent build, test, and iterate on playable web games â 2D, 3D, and multiplayer â powered by Kimi K3 or Claude Fable 5.

entry.title: OpenAI Ships Hard Spend Limits After Runaway Agents Burned $72K Overnight
entry.summary: OpenAI brings true hard spend caps to all API accounts, closing a painful billing gap that left agentic workloads exposed to runaway costs

entry.title: Google Quantum AI's Willow Teaches Itself to Fix Errors Without Stopping
entry.summary: Google's Willow processor now uses reinforcement learning to self-calibrate mid-computation, achieving a 3.5x stability improvement and record-low logical error rates published in Nature.
